title: venMoreClearerGUI
body:
***WARNING : THIS PACK IS FULLY EXPERIMENTAL***
 
makes the vanilla GUI clear and transparent to make you see the world around you while sorting youre inventory .

**CHANGES THAT ARE INCLUDED IN THIS PACK**:

 --->Player inventory (survival/creative) .

 --->Mount inventory (Horse/llama/...) .

 --->Containers inventory (chest/hopper/...) .

 --->Other Functional Blocks' inventory (beacon/crafting table/...) .

 --->Villagers trading Interface .

 --->*Signs Haven't been modified*
